category_sources: Official Zim homepage describes Zim as a desktop wiki for notes, journals, meetings, task lists, and brainstorming.
source_facts.description says Zim is a graphical text editor for maintaining wiki pages.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is Zim - A Desktop Wiki Editor.
Official homepage heading is Zim - A Desktop Wiki.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README points users to the Zim website for project resources.
Official Zim website navigation includes Manual and FAQ.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/zim-desktop-wiki/zim-desktop-wiki; per instructions repo returned as null.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository language summary indicates Python implementation.
Official homepage lists note archives, journals, meeting notes, task lists, and brainstorming use cases.
source_facts.description identifies graphical text editor and wiki page collection.
